description: Minimal MCP servers — claude-forge v3.0 (3 servers). Full set: mcp-servers.optional.json

playwright.description: Headless browser automation (navigate, click, fill, screenshot, trace)

context7.description: Real-time library documentation (React 19, Next.js 15, etc.) — use BEFORE writing library code

jina-reader.description: URL-to-markdown via Jina AI — token-efficient web content (fetch replacement)

_notes.why_3_servers: Minimal dependency for broad user compatibility. memory → Claude Code Auto Memory. exa → built-in WebSearch. github → gh CLI. fetch → jina-reader fallback.
_notes.add_more: See mcp-servers.optional.json for 6+ additional servers (memory, exa, github, fetch, time, sequential-thinking). Copy entries into this file and run: ./install.sh --upgrade
